_comment: Per-block overrides for Tier 2 (doc-example validation). One entry per block whose markdown source we don't want to modify in place. Each entry is keyed by the line number of the opening fence (1-indexed). Remove an entry once the underlying block has been brought clean. See tests/README.md for the schema.

331.reason: library pattern references undeclared Email entity (intentional, library spec)

920.reason: soft-delete pattern references undeclared User entity (intentional, library spec)

1459.reason: usage-limits pattern uses .created(...) ellipsis as doc convention
